tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

tags.name: New User Exclusives
tags.tagLine: $10 OFF and $3.99 service fee waiver ($60 min. spend)! Apply vouchers at checkout

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Baby Spinach offers tender, mild leaves perfect for fresh salads, smoothies, and light sauteing. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, it guarantees high standards of quality and eco-friendliness. This versatile green blends easily into dishes, adding a fresh, earthy flavor to both raw and cooked recipes. Its delicate texture makes it an ideal choice for adding instant nutrition and color.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Baby Spinach, rinse the leaves under cold water and gently pat dry. Use whole in salads or lightly sauté for a quick side. Blend into smoothies for a natural boost, or add at the end of cooking to soups and pasta for a fresh, tender bite. Serve promptly to enjoy its delicate taste and vibrant color.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
